place: Laem Sor, Na Muang, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84140, Thailand
title: Four-Bedroom Beachfront Pool Villa on Laem Sor's Southern Coast
blurb: A four-bedroom beachfront pool villa on Koh Samui's tranquil southern coast at Laem Sor, with direct access to soft white sand and the turquoise Gulf of Thailand. Four en-suite bedrooms, a horizon-edge infinity pool and floor-to-ceiling sea views, set in a landscaped tropical garden. Freehold, move-in ready.
detail:
Island elegance on Koh Samui's serene southern coast — an exceptional four-bedroom beachfront pool villa at Laem Sor that pairs architectural sophistication with the calm of a tropical seaside retreat. Set on a private parcel with direct beachfront access, it lets residents step from the home onto soft white sand and into the turquoise water of the Gulf of Thailand — an exclusive residence or a high-value investment in one of Samui's most peaceful and scenic regions.

Four spacious bedrooms each have an elegant en-suite bathroom, ensuring comfort and privacy for family and guests, while the interior is designed to embrace natural light, with floor-to-ceiling windows framing the sea and a seamless flow between indoor and outdoor living. At its heart is a striking infinity pool that appears to merge with the horizon, wrapped by a beautifully landscaped tropical garden and curated outdoor spaces for relaxation and gatherings under the open sky. Private parking and full turnkey furnishing complete the offering.

Laem Sor is celebrated for unspoiled beauty, a tranquil atmosphere and secluded stretches of beach. Unlike the busier tourist hubs, it offers unmatched privacy while remaining accessible to the island's amenities — leisurely walks along quiet shores, cultural sites such as the Laem Sor Pagoda, and fresh seafood at nearby beachfront restaurants. Shopping and dining in Lamai and Thong Krut are a short drive away, and Samui International Airport is reachable in under forty minutes.

Beachfront homes with freehold ownership in prime Samui locations remain limited, and as the island continues to attract international buyers and luxury tourism, the villa offers both an exquisite private residence and strong long-term investment and rental appeal. Offered freehold under Chanote title, brand-new, fully furnished and move-in ready — priced at ฿94,000,000.

features.l: Near Laem Sor Pagoda & Thong Krut
